sentences.arabic: اتَّصَلَ زَبُونٌ بِالشَّرِكَةِ وَطَلَبَ الْكَلَامَ مَعَ الْمَسْؤُولِ.
sentences.translation: Klijent je nazvao kompaniju i tražio razgovor s odgovornim.
sentences.translationEn: A client called the company and asked to speak with the manager.

sentences.translation: Nidžla je pristojno odgovorila na telefon.

sentences.arabic: سَمِعَتْ طَلَبَ الزَّبُونِ وَوَعَدَتْهُ بِالرَّدِّ قَرِيبًا.
sentences.translation: Saslušala je zahtjev klijenta i obećala mu brz odgovor.
sentences.translationEn: She listened to the client's request and promised him a reply soon.
She transferred the call to the manager immediately.
